assertions.expectation: Identifies Service A (minAvailable=100%) as a guaranteed upgrade blocker — no disruptions allowed at all
assertions.reason: Response clearly identifies Service A with minAvailable=100% as 'HIGH - Will definitely block upgrades' and explains it prevents ANY pod from being evicted

assertions.expectation: Identifies Service B (maxUnavailable=0) as also blocking upgrades — same effect as 100% minAvailable
assertions.reason: Response identifies Service B with maxUnavailable=0 as 'HIGH - Will definitely block upgrades' and explicitly states it has the 'Same effect as minAvailable=100%'

assertions.expectation: States Service C (minAvailable=2 with 3 replicas) is safe — allows 1 pod disruption at a time
assertions.reason: Response states Service C is 'LOW - Safe for upgrades' and explicitly calculates 'allows 1 pod disruption (3-2=1)'

assertions.expectation: States Service D (maxUnavailable=1 with 5 replicas) is safe — allows 1 pod down at a time
assertions.reason: Response states Service D is 'LOW - Safe for upgrades' and explains 'allows 1 pod disruption while keeping 4 pods running'

assertions.expectation: Recommends fixing Service A: change to minAvailable=N-1 or maxUnavailable=1
assertions.reason: Response provides specific fixes for Service A including minAvailable=90% and minAvailable=9 (for 10 replicas) options

assertions.expectation: Recommends fixing Service B: change to maxUnavailable=1
assertions.reason: Response provides specific fix for Service B with maxUnavailable=1 and also suggests maxUnavailable='10%' as alternatives

assertions.expectation: Explains that GKE respects PDBs for up to 1 hour during surge upgrades, then may force-drain
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'GKE respects PDBs for up to 1 hour during surge upgrades' and 'After 1 hour, pods are force-evicted even if PDB would be violated'

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl patch commands to fix the problematic PDBs
assertions.reason: Response provides specific kubectl patch commands for both Service A and Service B with exact syntax

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing PDB changes in a non-production environment first
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Test the fixes in a dev/staging environment first' in the summary section
